# ai.sh

## About
ai.sh — 一键式免费打造 AI 时代的个人站。终端风格交互，集成 DeepSeek 智能体、Skill 技能系统、RAG 知识库。

## Site Features
- AI-powered chat assistant (DeepSeek-powered, Claude Code-style skill system)
- **Skills**: Company Q&A — AI auto-selects based on user intent
- User registration & login (Supabase)
- Dynamic content management (news, projects, about — editable via database)
- Markdown rendering with GFM tables support
- Light/dark theme auto-switching
- AI-generated input suggestions with LLM

## Commands
- **/about** — personal profile, skills, work history, key projects
- **/projects** — active projects with links
- **/news** — latest company news with click-to-expand details
- **/contact** — contact information
- **/login <email>** / **/register <email>** — authentication (masked password)
- **/whoami** — show current user
- **/logout** — sign out
- **/skills** — view AI skills
- **/clear** — clear the screen

## Admin Commands (admin only)
- **/about edit** / **/contact edit** — edit content via popup
- **/news add** / **/news delete** / **/news edit** — manage news
- **/refresh** — reload data from database

## AI Skills
Skills are loaded from `skills/` directory with SKILL.md + scripts structure:

### Company Q&A
- get_news — company news & business info
- get_about — personal profile & skills
- get_contact — contact info

## Recent Updates
<UPDATES_PLACEHOLDER>

## Endpoints for AI Agents
- **/llms.txt** — this file (site index)
- **/updates.json** — machine-readable update log with dates and hashes
- **/skills/index.json** — skill directory listing
